remediation: Add Procore-aware source-lineage and degraded-state vocabulary where read models can later consume Procore-derived signals.
Add envelope/sourceStatus handling for mapping-missing, permission-denied, tool-disabled, stale, rate-limited, endpoint-deprecated, object-inaccessible.
Do not introduce live Procore runtime.
Add fixture-backed Procore mapping status and sync-health cards.
Add operational-signal card for open/overdue RFIs, submittals, observations, punch, daily-log completeness, and drawing/spec currency.
Add source-of-record and freshness labels.
Add Procore-derived priority action candidates with source-lineage and auto-close/stale behavior.
Maintain no source mutation; Procore object remains Procore-owned while PCC action is derived.
Add read-only Procore Directory Comparison posture.
No auto-granting SharePoint access from Procore directory data.
Add mismatch categories: in Procore not PCC, in PCC not Procore, inactive, company/role mismatch.
Represent Procore documents/drawings/specs/photos as metadata/object links/evidence only.
No recursive file mirror, no binary replication, no SharePoint copy of Procore file tree.
Add document-currency signal contract.
Add Procore-derived readiness impacts: unresolved RFI, overdue submittal, open observation, open punch, missing daily log, stale drawing/spec, unmapped Procore project.
Stale Procore data cannot silently support green readiness posture.
Bind startup/safety/closeout readiness to Procore supporting context through fixtures only.
Add source-confidence scoring based on mapping/sync health/freshness.
Add Procore object-link evidence for drawings/specs/photos/daily logs/observations/RFIs/Procore inspections.
Preserve PCC ownership of Permit Log and Required Inspection Log unless the specific inspection object is generated in Procore.
Compare PCC planned responsibility against Procore actual workflow ownership.
Do not allow Procore assignments to overwrite PCC responsibility matrix records.
Add Procore-derived constraint/risk/exposure candidate examples.
Human acceptance required before a Procore-derived candidate becomes a PCC-owned constraint.
Preserve legal/claim/delay boundary.
Use Procore commitments/change events/submittals/vendors only as object links, curated summaries, reconciliation evidence, or derived signals.
No Procore commitment/PO/subcontract/SOV/CCO/invoice/payment write-back.
No Sage posting or accounting truth derived from Procore.
Patch existing Wave 13 contracts/tests if current repo truth lacks the common Procore data-layer contract references.
